positive: A vibrant, detailed illustration of a mystical bioluminescent forest at twilight. Giant glowing mushrooms illuminate winding paths and exotic, fantastical flora. Style of Studio Ghibli meets Art Nouveau, highly detailed, soft glow, cinematic lighting, UHD.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, noisy, grainy
